name: UploadJob
description: Tracks the lifecycle and progress of a punch data upload operation, including parsing, validation, and batch saving results.

project_id.description: ID of the project this upload belongs to.

user_email.description: Email of the user who initiated the upload.

file_name.description: Original name of the uploaded file.

file_mime_type.description: MIME type of the file (csv, xlsx, etc).

file_size_bytes.description: Size of the file in bytes.

file_uri.description: Internal storage URI of the uploaded raw file.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the upload job.

records_total.description: Total records found in the file.

records_invalid_data.description: Records with valid structure but invalid data (e.g., unknown employee).

records_duplicate.description: Records that already exist and were skipped.

records_to_save.description: Count of unique valid records intended for saving.

records_rolled_back.description: Count of records deleted during failure recovery.

error_message.description: Plain language error message for the user if job failed.

warnings_json.description: JSON array of non-blocking warning messages.

import_batch_id.description: Unique tag applied to punches created by this job, used for recovery/rollback.
